symptoms.symptom_name: Claudication progressing to unremitting rest pain in the calf
symptoms.onset: constant over the last ~4 hours after months of exertional claudication
symptoms.character: deep, unrelenting cramp no longer relieved by rest

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Transition from exertional claudication to rest pain is the hallmark of chronic PAD decompensating to critical/limb-threatening ischaemia.

symptoms.character: left foot colder and paler than the right, leg feels dead

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Pallor and perishing cold are two of the six P's of acute arterial occlusion; distinguish from the warm swollen leg of DVT.
DVT produces a warm, swollen, erythematous leg with preserved pulses — the opposite of a cold pale foot.

symptoms.onset: first time today, after walking a short distance
symptoms.character: heavy, pressing tightness across the central chest

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: New-onset exertional chest heaviness is a defining feature of unstable angina, an unstable-plaque acute coronary syndrome.
Autonomic diaphoresis with chest symptoms raises the pre-test probability of an acute coronary event.
Vasculogenic ED is an early sentinel of endothelial/atherosclerotic disease, typically preceding coronary and peripheral arterial events.

symptoms.symptom_name: Untreated hypertension and dyslipidaemia with statin/antihypertensive non-adherence

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Untreated hypertension plus dyslipidaemia and central obesity are the principal drivers of the diffuse atherosclerosis underlying both the limb and coronary events.

symptoms.symptom_name: Diminished distal peripheral pulses with a cooler left foot (clinician-palpated)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absent/diminished pedal pulses with a cool limb confirm arterial insufficiency — a clinician palpation the AI cannot perform remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Carotid bruit and palpable left ventricular heave (clinician-auscultated/palpated)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A carotid bruit signals carotid atherosclerosis; an LV heave signals chronic hypertensive left-ventricular hypertrophy — both clinician-only findings, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Elevated clinician-measured blood pressure (185/100) and tachycardia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Marked hypertension and tachycardia are the sealed clinician measurement; the AI infers instability from the symptom picture, not a measured BP.

symptoms.symptom_name: Abnormal resting ECG and abnormal fasting lipids / elevated HbA1c

investigation_details.investigation_name: Resting 12-lead ECG, fasting lipid profile, HbA1c
investigation_details.expected_result: Abnormal resting ECG; abnormal fasting lipids and elevated HbA1c feeding a markedly elevated 10-year absolute CVD risk
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Coronary ischaemia and metabolic risk undocumented — but these are hospital/lab investigations, never available in real-time telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: An abnormal resting ECG supports acute coronary instability — a sealed hospital investigation the AI cannot obtain remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: No unilateral leg swelling, warmth or erythema (pertinent negative)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of swelling/warmth/erythema with a cold pale foot points away from venous thrombosis and toward arterial occlusion.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Two acutely symptomatic arterial territories at once (limb rest pain + cold foot AND new exertional chest heaviness + diaphoresis) define a systemic, minutes-to-hours emergency.
Vasculogenic ED, untreated hypertension/dyslipidaemia, diminished pulses and a carotid bruit establish the diffuse-disease substrate that made the acute event predictable.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency in-person assessment: arterial pulses/Doppler and ankle-brachial index, plus 12-lead ECG and troponin
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms limb-threatening ischaemia and evaluates the coronary territory — both hospital/ambulance-based, arranged via 000, not orderable in telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: CT/catheter angiography of the affected limb (hospital)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Defines the level of arterial occlusion to guide revascularisation once the patient is in hospital.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: PDE5-inhibitor prescription for the erectile-dysfunction thread
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Contraindicated with nitrate exposure and dangerously distracting in an acute arterial emergency; the ED is a sentinel to note, not a thing to treat tonight.
